burrow_mouth.text: A wide burrow dug into the hillside, framed by gnawed bones. Whatever lives here is gone now — or hunting. Tracks lead outward, not inward.

den_chamber.text: The den chamber is dry and lined with matted fur. Cached kills and gnawed scraps are piled in the corners — some still edible.

choices.label: Search deeper for anything the creature couldn't eat.

back_of_den.text: At the rear of the den, a human pack. The creature collected it. A sealed tin and wrapped cloth bundle are inside, untouched.

creature_returns.text: A low growl behind you. You sprint out and it doesn't follow, but your heart nearly stops.

claw_trap.text: A rusted snare set by the creature's previous occupant snaps shut on your wrist.
